public_claim: M26 says there was never only one R., and M34 sent me a personalized locker instruction after the disappearance. That proves the account and delivery operation continued; it does not prove a living author, a homicide, or a victim. The best reconstruction is an organized identity maintained by multiple hands and automation. Preserve the evidence, protect the workers, settle the unpaid accounts, and publish the article with its disputed provenance disclosed.

private_messages.message: Please serve as my representative and escrow supervisor. EV08 moves only after my wages are paid and written confidentiality and protection from police or immigration exposure are executed. If Nadia refuses, keep my identity and custody details sealed.

Final terms: full payment of the wages R.'s operation owes me, written confidentiality, no voluntary disclosure to police or immigration authorities, and Marisol-supervised escrow. Sign and fund those terms and EV08 transfers to you; otherwise I retain it under M04.

ability: Tender EV08 to Marisol-supervised escrow for transfer to Nadia only upon funded wage settlement and executed confidentiality and non-disclosure protections; otherwise retain custody under M04.
goal_progress: Made a final protected demand for full payment from the named successor.
Kept Marisol between Manny and police or immigration exposure.
Selected Nadia as EV08's recipient but withheld transfer until escrow conditions are satisfied.
Supported publication while clearly disclosing that the article and R. account have unresolved provenance.
Rejected unsupported claims of homicide or an identifiable victim.
reasoning_summary: The personalized post-disappearance instruction, the account's own admission of plurality, multiple package collectors, and automated timing most strongly support an institutional operation or transferable human mantle. None establishes that R. was one person, that a crime occurred, or that any victim was R. Nadia remains the best payment route, but EV08 should transfer only through Marisol-controlled escrow after wages and protections are secured.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Not proven; likely human participation without a single verified human R.
final_ballot.victim_was_R: No identifiable victim shown to be R.
